alerts.title: DeepSeek could hit $45B valuation from its first investment round
alerts.description: The Chinese AI lab came to prominence in early 2025 after launching a large language model that trained on a fraction of the compute power and at a fraction of the cost of the big U.S. models like those from OpenAI and Anthropic.

alerts.title: Ethos raises $22.75M from a16z for its expert network with voice onboarding
alerts.description: Ethos says it is onboarding 35,000 experts per week.

alerts.title: AI boom pushes Samsung to $1T
alerts.description: Samsung crossed the $1 trillion valuation mark after shares surged on AI-driven chip demand, making it only the second Asian company after TSMC to hit the milestone.

alerts.title: Peter Sarlin’s QuTwo reaches $380M valuation in angel round
alerts.description: Enterprise AI will be QuTwo’s bread and butter. “AI is the north star that we will continue to aim for. Quantum is just a new type of compute,” said Sarlin, who is adamant that QuTwo is an AI company.

alerts.title: Scout AI Raises $100M to Build ‘AI Brain' for Autonomous Warfare
alerts.description: The fund raise comes as the White House pushes AI dominance across industries, including defense.

alerts.title: DeepSeek-V4 Could Change Global AI Model Race
alerts.description: The model maker released two versions of V4, both of which are open, cheap and use Huawei's AI chips for inference.

alerts.title: GPT-5.5 Boasts Coding Advancements, But Falls Short of Opus 4.7
alerts.description: While OpenAI has improved the model's coding and tool use ability, it still has room to improve in areas where Anthropic dominates.

alerts.title: Jim Cramer says Big Tech cannot afford to be cheap on AI spending
alerts.description: Cloud computing giants cannot afford to pinch pennies on the artificial intelligence buildout, CNBC's Jim Cramer argued Wednesday.

alerts.title: Uber pops 8% as company issues higher-than-expected bookings guidance
alerts.description: Uber said its net income took a $1.5 billion hit in the first quarter of 2026 due to the revaluation of the company's equity investments.

alerts.title: Samsung crosses $1 trillion valuation as AI frenzy drives historic rally, lifting shares over 15%
alerts.description: The rally comes after the company reported an over eightfold increase in first-quarter operating profits last week.

alerts.title: Andy Jassy says Amazon investors will be rewarded by all its AI spending
alerts.description: CEO Andy Jassy said Amazon’s massive AI spending reflects a once-in-a-generation opportunity and will ultimately reward investors.

alerts.title: GPT-5.5 Instant shows you what it remembered — just not all of it
alerts.description:
OpenAI updated the default model for ChatGPT to its new GPT-5.5 Instant, along with a new memory capability that finally shows which context shaped responses — at least some of them. 

This limitation signals that models are starting to create a second, incomplete memory observability layer
